name: America Chavez
ability: You always draw this card on turn 6, and not before.

name: Angel
ability: When one of your cards is destroyed, this flies out of your deck to replace it.

name: Angela
ability: After you play a card here, +2 Power.

name: Apocalypse
ability: When you discard this from your hand, put it back with +4 Power.

name: Armor
ability: Ongoing: Cards at this location can’t be destroyed.

name: Bishop
ability: After you play a card, this gains +1 Power.

name: Blade
ability: On Reveal: Discard a card from your hand.

name: Cable
ability: On Reveal: Put the bottom card of your opponent’s deck into your hand.

name: Captain America
ability: Ongoing: Your other cards at this location have +1 Power.

name: Carnage
ability: On Reveal: Destroy your other cards here. +2 Power for each destroyed.

name: Cosmo
ability: Ongoing: On Reveal abilities won’t happen at this location.

name: Deathlok
ability: On Reveal: Destroy your other cards at this location.

name: Devil Dinosaur
ability: Ongoing: +2 Power for each card in your hand.

name: Doctor Strange
ability: On Reveal: Move your highest Power cards to this location.

name: Domino
ability: You always draw this card on turn 2, and not before.

name: Elektra
ability: On Reveal: Destroy a random enemy 1-Cost card at this location.

name: Enchantress
ability: On Reveal: Remove the abilities from all Ongoing cards at this location.

name: Forge
ability: On Reveal: Give the next card you play +2 Power.

name: Groot
ability: On Reveal: If your opponent played a card here this turn, +2 Power.

name: Heimdall
ability: On Reveal: Move your other cards one location to the left.

name: Hulkbuster
ability: On Reveal: Merge this card with a random friendly card at this location.

name: Iron Fist
ability: On Reveal: After you play your next card, move it one location to the left.

name: Klaw
ability: Ongoing: The location to the right has +6 Power.

name: Korg
ability: On Reveal: Shuffle a Rock into your opponent’s deck.

name: Kraven
ability: When a card moves here, this gets +2 Power.

name: Lady Sif
ability: On Reveal: Discard the highest-cost card from your hand.

name: Lizard
ability: Ongoing: -3 Power if your opponent has 4 cards here.

name: Mantis
ability: On Reveal: If your opponent played a card here this turn, draw a card from their deck.

name: Mister Sinister
ability: On Reveal: Add a Sinister Clone to this location with the same Power.

name: Moon Girl
ability: On Reveal: Duplicate your hand.

name: Morph
ability: On Reveal: Become a copy of a random card in your opponent’s hand.

name: Multiple Man
ability: When this moves, add a copy to the old location.

name: Namor
ability: Ongoing: +5 Power if this is your only card here.

name: Nova
ability: When this is destroyed, give your cards +1 Power.

name: Onslaught
ability: Ongoing: Double your other Ongoing effects at this location.

name: Professor X
ability: Ongoing: Lock down this location. (Cards can’t be added, removed, etc.)

ability: On Reveal: If your opponent played a card here this turn, +2 Power.

name: Scarlet Witch
ability: On Reveal: Replace this location with a random new one.

name: Spider-Woman

name: Squirrel Girl
ability: On Reveal: Add a 1-Power Squirrel to each other location.

name: Sword Master
ability: On Reveal: Discard a card from your hand.

ability: On Reveal: Draw a copy of the highest Cost card in your opponent’s hand.
